ApiKeysPage.Title: API Keys
ApiKeysPage.Subtitle: Generate a personal access token to connect Claude Desktop (or any MCP client) to your Hatch account. One active key per user — revoke and regenerate to rotate.
ApiKeysPage.NoActiveKeyHint: Click below to generate one. You'll see the token only once.
ApiKeysPage.ConfigSubtitle: Paste this into your Claude Desktop MCP settings. Replace <paste-your-token> with the token you saved when generating the key.
ApiKeysPage.SaveTokenNotice: Save this now — you won't see it again.
ApiKeysPage.TokenLossWarning: After closing, the token is gone for good. Revoke and regenerate if you lose it.

Notifications.Title: Inbox
Notifications.PanelFooter: Only people you accept can email you. Decline keeps your inbox tidy.

Messages.Title: Messages
Messages.EmptyConversations: You haven't started any conversations yet — accept a contact request to begin.
Messages.EmptyThreadHint: Choose a chat on the left, or accept a contact request to start a new one.
Messages.FailedToSend: Failed to send message. Please try again.

Contact.Title: Contact {name}
Contact.MessagePlaceholder: Hi {name}, I lead pre-seed at Slope Partners. Loved {app} — would love 25 mins to learn how you're thinking about it…
Contact.HeadsUpTitle: Heads up — this shares your contact info.
Contact.HeadsUpBody: If {name} accepts, they'll see your name, handle, email ({email}@hatch.dev), profile, and the link above. They can reply directly. You can revoke access anytime.
Contact.ConsentLabel: I'm sharing my contact details with {name} for the purpose of this {role} inquiry.
Contact.RepliesWithin: {name} typically replies within 1–2 days. We'll notify you when they accept or decline.
Contact.DefaultMessage: Hi {name}, I'd love to chat about {app}.
